creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Port japanese/tex-ptex is required by print/texlive-full. texlive-full can not be installed due to the fauilure of prerequisite japanese/tex-ptex:

[...]
config.lt: creating libtool
checking if libkpathsea supports debugging... no
checking for freetype-config... freetype-config
checking size of off_t... configure: error: in `/usr/ports/japanese/tex-ptex/work/texlive-20120701-source/texk/web2c':
configure: error: cannot compute sizeof (off_t)
See `config.log' for more details
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to hrs@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/japanese/tex-ptex/work/texlive-20120701-source/texk/web2c/config.log"
including the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be
a good idea to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system
(e.g. a /usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/japanese/tex-ptex
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/japanese/tex-ptex

===>>> make failed for japanese/tex-ptex
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for japanese/tex-ptex failed
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Killing background jobs

How-To-Repeat: try to install full port print/texlive-full on most recent ports tree and most recent 10.0-CURRENT and FreeBSD 9.2-PRE
